creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I do not think this is a problem, but this might be an idea instead. 
It's also not source-code related (not by modifying the source I mean), 
so I think this should be on the IdeasList on the Wiki so that someone 
willing to work on this can setup a Proof of Concept, and discussion can 
start whether or not we can and would like to support this officially. 
Ofcourse ideas like this are always welcome! So thank you very much for 
taking interest in improving the visibility and usability of FreeBSD 
(and it's source code).
